summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ventura Fresh Laundry CRM - Customer Portal & Public Pages. Backend API tests achieved 100% success rate (20/20 tests passed). Frontend UI tests passed completely for all 9 public pages, customer authentication, and admin login. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in customer registration endpoint.
passed_tests: API health check endpoints
Customer registration endpoint
Customer login endpoint
Customer profile retrieval
Customer orders retrieval
Invalid token rejection
Public pickup request form submission
Public contact form submission
Public B2B quote request submission
Admin login authentication
Landing page (/) loads with hero section
Services page (/services) loads with service cards
About page (/about) loads with company info
Contact page (/contact) loads with form and map
Store page (/store) loads with coming soon message
Blog page (/blog) loads with 6 blog posts
Schedule Pickup page (/schedule-pickup) loads with form
Customer login page (/account/login) loads
Customer account page (/account) loads after login
Admin login page (/login) loads
Admin dashboard (/admin) loads after login
Navigation consistency across all public pages
Footer present on all public pages
Customer registration flow (register -> redirect to account)
Customer login flow (login -> redirect to account)
Customer logout flow (logout -> redirect to login)
Customer can see orders created via pickup request
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in customer registration - _id field was not being excluded when returning customer data after insert_one()
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed line 1453 to exclude _id from customer response

test_credentials.Customer Test: Dynamic test emails created during tests

seed_data_creation: Test customers and orders created during automated tests with TEST_ prefix pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 public pages working correctly. Customer portal authentication (register/login/logout) fully functional. Public form endpoints (pickup-request, contact, quote-request) all working. Admin login still works at /login. MongoDB ObjectId bug was fixed in customer registration endpoint. Notification services (Resend, Twilio) are MOCKED - email/SMS sending is not actually implemented.
